name: Tahinopita (Tahini Cake)
recipeIngredient: 1 tbsp Veg. margarine or peanut oil
recipeInstructions:
This cake is frequently made during Lent as it contains no animal products. Peanut butter, the smooth, creamy variety, may be used instead of tahini.
Preheat oven to 180 C (350 F). Grease a 20 cm (8 inch) tube pan or a 20 x 30 cm (8 x 12 inch) slab cake pan with melted margarine or oil. Chill in refrigerator until required.
In a large bowl, beat tahini, sugar, and orange rind for 10 minutes. Gradually add orange juice. Sift dry ingredients twice and fold into the tahini mixture. Blend in walnuts and sultanas.
Dust chilled cake pan with flour and turn batter into pan. Spread evenly. Knock base of pan on table top to settle batter. Bake in moderate oven for 55-60 minutes (tube pan) or 45 minutes (slab cake).
Invert cake onto a cake rack and leave for 2-3 minutes before lifting the pan. Cool cake and cut into slices or squares to serve. Store cake in a sealed container.
